originalTitle: One ant for $220: The new frontier of wildlife trafficking
title: Tiny Ants, Big Secrets: A Story from Kenya!
content:
Hello, amazing friends! It's your kid-friendly reporter here, bringing you news from our beautiful continent, Africa! Today, we're talking about something very, very small, but very, very important: ANTS! You know ants, right? Those tiny, busy creatures that march in lines and build amazing homes underground. They live all over, especially in sunny Kenya, a wonderful country in Africa. Kenya is famous for its beautiful landscapes and incredible wildlife, from huge elephants to tiny insects. But guess what? Something strange is happening with our tiny ant friends. Some people are secretly taking ants from their homes in Kenya. They want to sell them for money. This secret taking is called "trafficking." It's like taking a toy from someone without asking. It's not right!

Meet Our Ant Friends!

Ants are super cool! They are insects, just like butterflies and bees. They have six legs and two antennae to feel their way around and smell things. They live in big families called colonies. Imagine living with thousands, or even millions, of your brothers and sisters! That's an ant colony! Each ant has a special job. Some are queen ants, who lay all the eggs for the colony. Some are worker ants, who find food, clean the nest, and take care of the young ants. Some are soldier ants, who protect the colony from danger. They are tiny, but they are very, very strong! They can lift things many times their own size with their strong jaws. Did you know? An ant can carry things that are 50 times heavier than itself! That's like you carrying a car! Wow!

Why Are People Taking Them?

This is the tricky part. Some people around the world think certain ants are very special. Maybe they have pretty colours, or they are very big, or they are just very rare, meaning not many of them are found anywhere else in the world. These people want to collect them, like you might collect stickers, stamps, or special cards. But these ants are not just pictures; they are living creatures! They have homes and families in nature that they need to be in. Some people even want to keep them as pets. While it might seem fun, wild animals, even tiny ants, are happiest and healthiest in their own homes, in nature, where they truly belong. Simple Explanation: The people who secretly take these ants are sometimes called "smugglers." They are like secret collectors who take ants from Kenya without permission. They want to sell them to other people far away to make money. This is wrong because it hurts the ants and our beautiful natural world.

A Tiny Ant, A Big Price Tag!

Here's something that might surprise you: some of these ants can be sold for a lot of money! Imagine one tiny ant being sold for 220 US Dollars! That's a huge amount for such a small creature. It's almost unbelievable! What is 220 US Dollars? It's a lot of money! It's enough to buy many, many yummy snacks, or lots of new books for your school, or even a brand-new bicycle! Can you believe that one tiny ant can cost so much? This big price makes some people want to catch more and more ants. They think of the money they can get, but they forget about the ants' well-being and the balance of nature. It’s a very sad thing when money makes people do wrong things. Did you know? There are over 12,000 different types of ants in the world! Some are super tiny, like the size of a pinhead, and some are quite big, like the size of your fingernail! Each type is unique and important to its home.

Ants Are Nature's Helpers!

Ants might be small, but they do really important jobs for our Earth and for us! They are like tiny superheroes of the natural world! They are like little gardeners! When they dig their tunnels underground, they help to mix the soil. This helps air and water get to the plant roots, which helps plants grow big and strong. And healthy plants give us fresh air to breathe and food to eat! They also clean up! Ants eat dead insects, tiny bits of leaves, and other small pieces of nature. They are like nature's recycling team, keeping our environment tidy and healthy. Without them, there would be a lot more mess! Imagine if all the ants suddenly disappeared! Our gardens, forests, and farms would not be as healthy or clean. Every single ant, no matter how small, has an important role to play in nature. Taking too many ants can make nature sad and unbalanced. It can affect other animals and plants too, because everything in nature is connected. Did you know? Some ants are called "leafcutter ants" because they cut pieces of leaves and carry them back to their nest. They don't eat the leaves themselves, but they use them to grow a special fungus inside their nest, and *that* is what they eat! They are like little farmers, growing their own food!

Protecting Our Tiny Treasures in Kenya

Kenya is famous for its amazing wildlife: big elephants, tall giraffes, speedy cheetahs, and colorful birds! But it's also home to countless tiny wonders, like our ants. These ants are a precious part of Kenya's natural beauty and its ecosystem. An "ecosystem" is like a big family where all plants, animals, and tiny creatures live together and help each other to keep nature healthy and strong. When people take ants from Kenya to sell them far away, it's like taking a piece of Kenya's nature away. It makes the ecosystem weaker and less whole. It's against the law to take wild animals from their homes without permission. The people who do this are called "wildlife traffickers," and they are breaking the rules designed to protect our Earth and its animals. Did you know? Safari ants, also known as driver ants, live in huge colonies, sometimes with millions of ants! They march in long, moving columns, eating other insects and small creatures they find along the way. They are very powerful and important hunters in their environment!

What Can We Do?

Even though we are kids, we can still help protect our tiny ant friends and all of nature! The most important thing is to learn about our amazing animal friends, big and small. The more we know, the more we can care for them and understand why they are important. Understand that all wild animals belong in the wild. Their homes are in nature, not in a box or a jar far away. That's where they are happiest and safest, and where they can do their important jobs. If you ever see someone trying to catch wild ants or other tiny animals in a strange way, or if someone is selling them secretly, you should tell a trusted grown-up right away. Tell your parents, your teacher, or another grown-up you trust. They will know what to do to help. We can all be protectors of our planet, even the smallest creatures on it. Let's appreciate and enjoy watching ants march in our gardens, build their homes, and do their important jobs. Let's keep our ant friends safe and happy in their real homes in Africa!
summary: Some people are secretly taking tiny ants from their homes in Kenya to sell them for a lot of money, which is called trafficking and hurts nature.
whyMatters: This matters because ants are important helpers in nature, keeping our Earth healthy by mixing soil and cleaning up. Taking them from their homes means they cannot do their jobs and it makes our beautiful country, Kenya, lose its natural treasures, making our ecosystem weaker.

originalTitle: Spurs want De Zerbi to be new permanent boss
title: A New Teacher for Tottenham Football Team!
content:
Hello, Football Friends!

Hi everyone! It's your friendly news reporter here, bringing you exciting news from the world of football. We love football, right? Kicking the ball, scoring goals, cheering for our favourite teams! Today, we have a story about a big team and a new teacher they want to help them play even better.

What's All the Fuss About?

There's a very famous football team called Tottenham Hotspur. It's a team from a country far, far away, called England. They wear special white shirts when they play their matches. Imagine a group of really talented players who can run super fast and kick the ball with amazing skill. They play in a very big stadium with thousands of fans cheering loudly for them!

What is a Coach?

Every football team needs a coach. Think of a coach like a very important teacher for the football players. A coach teaches the players how to play better as a team. They show them special tricks with the ball. They help them work together like a family. They also decide which players should play in a game and where they should stand on the field. It's a very, very important job! Did you know? Even in your school football team, you might have a coach! That person helps you learn the rules of the game and play fairly with your friends.

Tottenham Needs a New Teacher!

So, Tottenham Hotspur had a coach for a little while recently. His name was Igor Tudor. He was called an "interim boss." "Interim" is a big word that just means "for a short time." Imagine a substitute teacher who comes to your class for just a few days. He was helping out the team for a bit, but now he has left. So, Tottenham Hotspur needs a new, full-time teacher for their team. They want someone who will stay for a long, long time. We call this a "permanent boss." That means someone who is there for many years.

Who is Roberto De Zerbi?

Now, here comes the interesting part of our news! Tottenham Hotspur wants a very special man to be their new permanent coach. His name is Roberto De Zerbi. He is a very smart man who comes from a country called Italy, which is also far away. He knows a lot, lot about football. He has taught other teams before, and those teams played really well and in an exciting way under his guidance.

Why Do They Want Him?

Football teams look for coaches who are super good at helping players. Roberto De Zerbi is known for making his teams play very exciting football. His teams often score many goals and try new, clever things on the field. Tottenham Hotspur thinks he can make their team even stronger and help them win many more games. They want to "convince" him to come. That means they want to show him why their team is the best place for him to teach and coach! Did you know? Sometimes, a football coach can become almost as famous as some of the players, all because of how good they are at teaching and leading their team!

What Does a Coach Do Every Day?

Imagine waking up every morning and going to work to teach football all day long! That's what a coach does. It's more than just watching games. * **Training:** They plan special exercises for the players to do every day. This helps players run faster, kick the ball stronger, and pass it better to their teammates. * **Game Plans:** Before every big football match, the coach makes a secret plan. They decide where each player should stand on the field. They tell them what to do if the other team has the ball, and how to score goals. It's like a secret strategy! * **Talking to Players:** A coach also spends a lot of time talking to the players. They tell them when they did something good and praise them. They also help players when they make mistakes, showing them how to do better next time. It's all about helping them learn and grow as footballers and as a team.

Why Is This News Important?

This news is very important because a really good coach can change everything for a football team. If Tottenham Hotspur gets Roberto De Zerbi, maybe they will start winning even more games! They might even win big shiny trophies! Trophies are like big cups they get for being the best team in a competition. All the fans, the people who love the team and cheer for them, will be very, very happy. Did you know? Football is the most popular sport in the whole wide world! Millions of kids, just like you, play football with their friends every single day in Africa and all over the globe.

A Permanent Boss Means a Bright Future!

When a team gets a "permanent" boss, it means they want things to be steady and good for a long time. They want someone who will stay and build something great for many years. It's like having the same, wonderful teacher in your class all year long. You get to learn so much and grow together with them. Tottenham Hotspur hopes Roberto De Zerbi will be that wonderful teacher for them, helping their players shine super brightly on the football field. We hope he joins them and helps them play amazing football and win lots of games for their fans!
summary: A big football team called Tottenham Hotspur wants a new teacher for their players, a smart man named Roberto De Zerbi, to help them play even better and win many games!
whyMatters: Having a good coach is super important for a football team to win games, learn new skills, and make all their fans happy and proud!

originalTitle: Spurs have addressed their Tudor error - but cannot afford another
title: Spurs have addressed their Tudor error - but cannot afford another
content: Chief executive Vinai Venkatesham and sporting director Johan Lange must get the next Tottenham appointment correct or else they could follow Igor Tudor, writes Phil McNulty.
